core_model.structure_summary: A scalar Ito stochastic differential equation on the unit interval whose drift is a cubic (logistic-type) polynomial with state-dependent noise, and whose coefficients are switched by a finite-state continuous-time Markov chain.
core_model.canonical_form: dx = x(1-x)\big[-B_{r(t)} + (A_{r(t)}+B_{r(t)})x\big]\,dt + \sigma_{r(t)}\,x(1-x)\,dW,\quad r(t)\in\{1,\dots,n\}\text{ a Markov chain}

variables.meaning: scalar fraction confined to the unit interval (a two-component simplex coordinate)
drift coefficients and noise intensities selected by the active Markov-chain state
discrete switching index following a finite-state continuous-time Markov chain with generator matrix

deterministic_skeleton.summary: A scalar first-order ordinary differential equation with cubic logistic-type drift on the unit interval whose growth rate is proportional to a relative-fitness difference.

notes: Core object is the regime-switching scalar SDE for the reduced simplex coordinate (eq. dS(t)); the multi-strategy replicator system and the generator LV are supporting. Skeleton is the deterministic replicator/logistic ODE obtained by dropping the noise and freezing the switching.
